stem: Nitrogen is placed inside a container kept at constant pressure. A line on a graph relates the estimated volume y, in liters, of the nitrogen to its temperature x in kelvins. The line passes through the points (100, 1.5) and (600, 9). What is the estimated volume, in liters, of the nitrogen when its temperature is 600 kelvins?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. The line passes through (600, 9), so when x = 600 kelvins, the volume y = 9 liters.

Choices B, C, and D misread the relevant coordinates.
